type LayoutType = 'grid' | 'masonry' | 'carousel'

// ── Dialog content ──────────────────────────────────────────────

const GalleryEditorDialogContent: FC<{
  dismiss: () => void
  initialImages: GalleryImage[]
  initialLayout: LayoutType
  onImagesChange: (images: GalleryImage[]) => void
  onLayoutChange: (layout: LayoutType) => void
}> = ({
  dismiss,
  initialImages,
  initialLayout,
  onImagesChange,
  onLayoutChange,
}) => {
  const [images, setImages] = useState<GalleryImage[]>(() =>
    initialImages.map((img) => ({ ...img })),
  )
  const [layout, setLayout] = useState<LayoutType>(initialLayout)
  const newInputRef = useRef<HTMLInputElement>(null)

  const handleAddImage = useCallback(() => {
    setImages((prev) => [...prev, { src: '', alt: '' }])
    requestAnimationFrame(() => {
      newInputRef.current?.focus()
    })
  }, [])

  const handleRemoveImage = useCallback((index: number) => {
    setImages((prev) => prev.filter((_, i) => i !== index))
  }, [])

  const handleMoveImage = useCallback((index: number, dir: -1 | 1) => {
    setImages((prev) => {
      const next = [...prev]
      const target = index + dir
      if (target < 0 || target >= next.length) return prev
      ;[next[index], next[target]] = [next[target], next[index]]
      return next
    })
  }, [])

  const handleUpdateImage = useCallback(
    (index: number, field: keyof GalleryImage, value: string) => {
      setImages((prev) =>
        prev.map((img, i) => (i === index ? { ...img, [field]: value } : img)),
      )

    [],
  )

  const handleSave = useCallback(() => {
    const filtered = images.filter((img) => img.src.trim())
    onImagesChange(filtered)
    onLayoutChange(layout)

          <span>Gallery Editor</span>

          <div className={css.galleryLayoutToggle}>
            {layouts.map((l) => (
              <button
                key={l.value}
                type="button"
                className={
                  layout === l.value
                    ? css.galleryLayoutBtnActive
                    : css.galleryLayoutBtn
                }
                onClick={() => setLayout(l.value)}
              >
                {l.label}
              </button>
            ))}
          </div>
        </div>

        <button

          className={css.galleryHeaderClose}
          onClick={dismiss}
        >
          <X size={18} />
        </button>
      </div>

      <div className={css.galleryDialogBody}>

                      <ImageIcon size={20} />
                    </span>
                  )}
                </div>

                <div className={css.galleryImageFields}>
                  <input
                    ref={index === images.length - 1 ? newInputRef : undefined}
                    clas

// ── Main component ──────────────────────────────────────────────

export const GalleryEditRenderer: FC<GalleryRendererProps> = ({
  images,
  layout,
  onImagesChange,
  onLayoutChange,
}) => {
  const { className: portalClassName } = usePortalTheme()

  const handleOpenEditor = useCallback(() => {
    if (!onImagesChange || !onLayoutChange) return
    presentDialog({
      content: ({ dismiss }) => (
        <GalleryEditorDialogContent
          dismiss={dismiss}
          initialImages={images}
          initialLayout={layout}
          onImagesChange={onImagesChange}
          onLayoutChange={onLayoutChange}
        />
      ),
      className: css.galleryDialogPopup,
      portalClassName,
      showCloseButton: false,
      clickOutsideToDismiss: false,
    })
  }, [images, layout, onImagesChange, onLayoutChange, portalClassName])

  if (!onImagesChange) {
    return <GalleryRenderer images={images} layout={layout} />
  }

  if (images.length === 0) {
    return (
      <div className={css.galleryEditContainer}>
        <div className={css.galleryEmptyState}>
          <ImageIcon size={32} />
          <span>Empty gallery</span>
        </div>
        <button
          type="button"
          className={css.galleryEditOverlay}
          onClick={handleOpenEditor}
        >
          <span className={css.galleryEditLabel}>
            <Pencil size={16} />
            Edit Gallery
          </span>
        </button>
      </div>
    )
  }

  return (
    <div className={css.galleryEditContainer}>
      <GalleryRenderer images={images} layout={layout} />
      <button
        type="button"
        className={css.galleryEditOverlay}
        onClick={handleOpenEditor}
      >
        <span className={css.galleryEditLabel}>
          <Pencil size={16} />
          Edit Gallery
        </span>
      </button>
    </div>
  )
}

import { useColorScheme } from '@shiro/rich-editor'
import { presentDialog } from '@shiro/rich-editor-ui'
import { usePortalTheme } from '@shiro/rich-style-token'
import { Clipboard, Download, Pencil, Upload, X } from 'lucide-react'
import type { FC } from 'react'
import { useCallback, useEffect, useRef, useState } from 'react'

import * as css from './styles.css'
import { useTldrawConfig } from './TldrawConfigContext'
import { useTldrawData } from './useTldrawData'

export interface TldrawEditRendererProps {
  snapshot: string
  onSnapshotChange: (snapshot: string) => void
}

const SAVE_DEBOUNCE_MS = 2000

// ── Dialog content (fullscreen editor) ──────────────────────────

const TldrawEditorDialogContent: FC<{
  dismiss: () => void
  TldrawComponent: FC<any>
  initialData: Record<string, any> | undefined
  initialSnapshot: string
  theme: 'light' | 'dark'
  onSave: (ref: string) => void
  saveSnapshot?: (snapshot: object) => Promise<string>
  onClose: (doc?: Record<string, any>) => void
}> = ({
  dismiss,
  TldrawComponent,
  initialData,
  initialSnapshot,
  theme,
  onSave,
  saveSnapshot,
  onClose,
}) => {
  const { className: portalClassName } = usePortalTheme()
  const editorRef = useRef<any>(null)
  const saveTimerRef = useRef<ReturnType<typeof setTimeout>>(undefined)
  const [isDirty, setIsDirty] = useState(false)
  const isDirtyRef = useRef(false)
  const [storageMode, setStorageMode] = useState<'inline' | 'remote'>(() => {
    if (!saveSnapshot || !initialSnapshot) return 'inline'
    try {
      JSON.parse(initialSnapshot)
      return 'inline'
    } catch {
      return 'remote'
    }
  })
  const storageModeRef = useRef(storageMode)
  const [savedRef, setSavedRef] = useState(() => {
    if (!saveSnapshot || !initialSnapshot) return ''
    try {
      JSON.parse(initialSnapshot)
      return ''
    } catch {
      return initialSnapshot
    }
  })
  const [isSaving, setIsSaving] = useState(false)

  useEffect(() => {
    return () => {
      if (saveTimerRef.current) clearTimeout(saveTimerRef.current)
    }
  }, [])

  const performSave = useCallback(() => {
    if (saveTimerRef.current) clearTimeout(saveTimerRef.current)
    const editor = editorRef.current
    if (!editor) return
    try {
      const doc = editor.store.getSnapshot()
      if (storageModeRef.current === 'remote' && saveSnapshot) {
        setIsSaving(true)
        saveSnapshot(doc).then(
          (ref) => {
            onSave(ref)
            isDirtyRef.current = false
            setIsDirty(false)
            setIsSaving(false)
            setSavedRef(ref)
          },
          () => setIsSaving(false),
        )
      } else {
        onSave(JSON.stringify(doc))
        isDirtyRef.current = false
        setIsDirty(false)
      }
    } catch {
      // ignore
    }
  }, [onSave, saveSnapshot])

  const handleMount = useCallback(
    (editor: any) => {
      editorRef.current = editor
      editor.user.updateUserPreferences({ colorScheme: theme })
      editor.store.listen(
        () => {
          isDirtyRef.current = true
          setIsDirty(true)
          if (saveTimerRef.current) clearTimeout(saveTimerRef.current)
          saveTimerRef.current = setTimeout(() => performSave(), SAVE_DEBOUNCE_MS)
        },
        { scope: 'document' },
      )
    },
    [theme, performSave],
  )

  const handleSaveAndClose = useCallback(() => {
    performSave()
    const editor = editorRef.current
    onClose(editor?.store.getSnapshot())
    dismiss()
  }, [performSave, onClose, dismiss])

  const handleDiscard = useCallback(() => {
    if (saveTimerRef.current) clearTimeout(saveTimerRef.current)
    dismiss()
  }, [dismiss])

  const showConfirmDialog = useCallback(() => {
    presentDialog({
      title: 'Unsaved Changes',
      description:
        'You have unsaved changes that will be lost if you close now.',
      content: ({ dismiss: dismissConfirm }) => (
        <div className={css.tldrawConfirmActions}>
          <button
            type="button"
            className={css.tldrawConfirmBtn}
            onClick={dismissConfirm}
          >
            Continue Editing
          </button>
          <button
            type="button"
            className={css.tldrawConfirmBtnDanger}
            onClick={() => {
              dismissConfirm()
              handleDiscard()
            }}
          >
            Discard
          </button>
          <button
            type="button"
            className={css.tldrawConfirmBtnPrimary}
            onClick={() => {
              dismissConfirm()
              handleSaveAndClose()
            }}
          >
            Save & Close
          </button>
        </div>
      ),
      portalClassName,
      showCloseButton: false,
      clickOutsideToDismiss: false,
    })
  }, [handleDiscard, handleSaveAndClose, portalClass
... (truncated)

import type { ReactNode } from 'react'
import { createContext, use, useMemo } from 'react'

export interface TldrawConfig {
  apiUrl?: string
  saveSnapshot?: (snapshot: object) => Promise<string>
}

const TldrawConfigContext = createContext<TldrawConfig>({})

export function TldrawConfigProvider({
  apiUrl,
  saveSnapshot,
  children,
}: TldrawConfig & { children: ReactNode }) {
  const value = useMemo(
    () => ({ apiUrl, saveSnapshot }),
    [apiUrl, saveSnapshot],
  )
  return (
    <TldrawConfigContext.Provider value={value}>
      {children}
    </TldrawConfigContext.Provider>
  )
}

export function useTldrawConfig(): TldrawConfig {
  return use(TldrawConfigContext)
}
```
</details></tool-use>

import { useEffect, useMemo, useState } from 'react'

import { useTldrawConfig } from './TldrawConfigContext'

interface TldrawDataState {
  snapshot: Record<string, any> | undefined
  loading: boolean
  error: string
}

export function useTldrawData(data: string): TldrawDataState {
  const { apiUrl } = useTldrawConfig()

  const parsed = useMemo(() => {
    if (!data) return { type: 'empty' as const }

    try {
      const json = JSON.parse(data)
      if (json && typeof json === 'object') {
        return {
          type: 'inline' as const,
          snapshot: json as Record<string, any>,
        }
      }
    } catch {
      // not JSON
    }

    const firstLine = data.split('\n')[0].trim()
    let fetchUrl: string | undefined

    if (firstLine.startsWith('http')) {
      fetchUrl = firstLine
    } else if (firstLine.startsWith('ref:') && apiUrl) {
      fetchUrl = `${apiUrl}/objects/${firstLine.slice(4)}`
    }

    if (fetchUrl) {
      return { type: 'remote' as const, fetchUrl }
    }

    return {
      type: 'error' as const,
      error: firstLine.startsWith('ref:')
        ? 'Missing apiUrl for ref resolution'
        : 'Unrecognized snapshot format',
    }
  }, [data, apiUrl])

  const fetchUrl = parsed.type === 'remote' ? parsed.fetchUrl : undefined

  const [remoteSnapshot, setRemoteSnapshot] = useState<
    Record<string, any> | undefined
  >()
  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(!!fetchUrl)
  const [error, setError] = useState('')

  useEffect(() => {
    if (!fetchUrl) return

    let cancelled = false
    setLoading(true)
    setError('')

    fetch(fetchUrl)
      .then((res) => {
        if (!res.ok) throw new Error(`HTTP ${res.status}`)
        return res.json()
      })
      .then((json) => {
        if (!cancelled) {
          setRemoteSnapshot(json)
          setLoading(false)
        }
      })
      .catch((err) => {
        if (!cancelled) {
          setError(err instanceof Error ? err.message : 'Failed to load')
          setLoading(false)
        }
      })

    return () => {
      cancelled = true
    }
  }, [fetchUrl])

  if (parsed.type === 'inline') {
    return { snapshot: parsed.snapshot, loading: false, error: '' }
  }

  if (parsed.type === 'remote') {
    return { snapshot: remoteSnapshot, loading, error }
  }

  if (parsed.type === 'error') {
    return { snapshot: undefined, loading: false, error: parsed.error }
  }

  return { snapshot: undefined, loading: false, error: '' }
}

import { useColorScheme } from '@shiro/rich-editor'
import { presentDialog } from '@shiro/rich-editor-ui'
import { usePortalTheme } from '@shiro/rich-style-token'
import { Maximize2, ScanSearch, X, ZoomIn, ZoomOut } from 'lucide-react'
import { Component, type FC, type ReactNode } from 'react'
import { useCallback, useEffect, useRef, useState } from 'react'

import * as css from './styles.css'
import { useTldrawData } from './useTldrawData'

export interface TldrawStaticRendererProps {
  snapshot: string
}

export const TldrawStaticRenderer: FC<TldrawStaticRendererProps> = ({
  snapshot,
}) => {
  const theme = useColorScheme()
  const containerRef = useRef<HTMLDivElement>(null)
  const [hasEnteredView, setHasEnteredView] = useState(false)

  useEffect(() => {
    if (hasEnteredView) return
    const target = containerRef.current
    if (!target) return

    const observer = new IntersectionObserver(
      (entries) => {
        if (entries.some((e) => e.isIntersecting)) {
          setHasEnteredView(true)
          observer.disconnect()
        }
      },
      { rootMargin: '200px 0px', threshold: 0.1 },
    )
    observer.observe(target)
    return () => observer.disconnect()
  }, [hasEnteredView])

  if (!hasEnteredView) {
    return (
      <div ref={containerRef} className={css.tldrawStaticContainer}>
        <div className={css.tldrawLoading}>Loading tldraw...</div>
      </div>
    )
  }

  return (
    <div ref={containerRef}>
      <TldrawStaticCanvas snapshot={snapshot} theme={theme} />
    </div>
  )
}

// --- Fullscreen readonly content ---

class TldrawErrorBoundary extends Component<
  { fallback: ReactNode; children: ReactNode },
  { hasError: boolean }
> {
  state = { hasError: false }
  static getDerivedStateFromError() {
    return { hasError: true }
  }
  render() {
    return this.state.hasError ? this.props.fallback : this.props.children
  }
}

import 'react-photo-view/dist/react-photo-view.css'

import {
  decodeThumbHash,
  type GalleryImage,
  type GalleryRendererProps,
} from '@shiro/rich-editor'
import { ChevronLeft, ChevronRight } from 'lucide-react'
import type { ComponentType, UIEventHandler } from 'react'
import { memo, useCallback, useEffect, useMemo, useRef, useState } from 'react'
import { useInView } from 'react-intersection-observer'
import { PhotoProvider, PhotoView } from 'react-photo-view'

import * as css from './styles.css'

const IMAGE_CONTAINER_MARGIN_INSET = 60
const CHILD_GAP = 15
const AUTOPLAY_DURATION = 5000

function throttle<T extends (...args: any[]) => void>(
  func: T,
  wait: number,
): T {
  let timeout: ReturnType<typeof setTimeout> | null = null
  return ((...args: Parameters<T>) => {
    if (!timeout) {
      timeout = setTimeout(() => {
        func(...args)
        timeout = null
      }, wait)
    }
  }) as T
}

function clsx(...classes: (string | false | undefined | null)[]): string {
  return classes.filter(Boolean).join(' ')
}

function useThumbhashStyle(
  image: GalleryImage,
): React.CSSProperties | undefined {
  return useMemo(() => {
    if (!image.thumbhash) return
    const url = decodeThumbHash(image.thumbhash)
    if (!url) return
    return { backgroundImage: `url(${url})`, backgroundSize: 'cover' }
  }, [image.thumbhash])
}

export const GalleryRenderer: ComponentType<GalleryRendererProps> = ({
  images,
  layout,
}) => {
  const [containerRef, setContainerRef] = useState<HTMLDivElement | null>(null)
  const [, setUpdated] = useState({})
  const memoedChildContainerWidthRef = useRef(0)

  useEffect(() => {
    if (!containerRef) return

    const ob = new ResizeObserver(() => {
      setUpdated({})
      calChild(containerRef)
    })

    function calChild(containerRef: HTMLDivElement) {
      const $child = containerRef.children.item(0)
      if ($child) {
        memoedChildContainerWidthRef.current = $child.clientWidth
      }
    }

    calChild(containerRef)
    ob.observe(containerRef)
    return () => {
      ob.disconnect()
    }
  }, [containerRef])

  const [currentIndex, setCurrentIndex] = useState(0)

  const handleOnScroll: UIEventHandler<HTMLDivElement> = useCallback(
    throttle<UIEventHandler<HTMLDivElement>>((e) => {
      const $ = e.target as HTMLDivElement

      const index = Math.floor(
        ($.scrollLeft + IMAGE_CONTAINER_MARGIN_INSET + 15) /
          memoedChildContainerWidthRef.current,
      )
      setCurrentIndex(index)
    }, 60),
    [],
  )

  const handleScrollTo = useCallback(
    (i: number) => {
      if (!containerRef) return

      containerRef.scrollTo({
        left: memoedChildContainerWidthRef.current * i,
        behavior: 'smooth',
      })
    },
    [containerRef],
  )

  const autoplayTimerRef = useRef<ReturnType<typeof setInterval> | null>(null)
  const isForward = useRef(true)
  const autoplayRef = useRef(true)

  const handleCancelAutoplay = useCallback(() => {
    if (!autoplayRef.current) return

    autoplayRef.current = false
    if (autoplayTimerRef.current) {
      clearInterval(autoplayTimerRef.current)
    }
  }, [])

  const { ref } = useInView({
    initialInView: false,
    triggerOnce: images.length < 2,
    onChange(inView) {
      if (images.length < 2 || !autoplayRef.current) return

      if (inView) {
        autoplayTimerRef.current = setInterval(() => {
          setCurrentIndex((prev) => {
            if (prev + 1 > images.length - 1 && isForward.current) {
              isForward.current = false
            }
            if (prev - 1 < 0 && !isForward.current) {
              isForward.current = true
            }

            const index = prev + (isForward.current ? 1 : -1)
            handleScrollTo(index)
            return index
          })
        }, AUTOPLAY_DURATION)
      } else {
        if (autoplayTimerRef.current) {
          clearInterval(autoplayTimerRef.current)
        }
      }
    },
  })

  useEffect(
    () => () => {
      if (autoplayTimerRef.current) {
        clearInterval(autoplayTimerRef.current)
      }
    },
    [],
  )

  if (images.length === 0) return null

  const layoutClass =
    layout === 'masonry'
      ? css.galleryMasonry
      : layout === 'carousel'
        ? css.galleryCarousel
        : css.galleryGrid

  if (images.length === 1 || layout === 'grid' || layout === 'masonry') {
    return (
      <PhotoProvider>
        <div className={clsx(css.gallery, layoutClass)}>
          {images.map((image, index) => (
            <GalleryFigure key={index} image={image} />
          ))}
        </div>
      </PhotoProvider>
    )
  }

  return (
    <PhotoProvider>
      <div
        className={clsx(css.gallery, css.galleryCarousel)}
        ref={ref}
        onTouchMove={handleCancelAutoplay}
        onWheel={handleCancelAutoplay}
      >
        <div
          className={css.gallery

import type { SerializedEditorState } from 'lexical'
import type { ComponentType } from 'react'

import type { AlertRendererProps } from '../components/renderers/AlertRenderer'
import type { BannerRendererProps } from '../components/renderers/BannerRenderer'
import type { CodeBlockRendererProps } from '../components/renderers/CodeBlockRenderer'
import type { FootnoteRendererProps } from '../components/renderers/FootnoteRenderer'
import type { ImageRendererProps } from '../components/renderers/ImageRenderer'
import type { KaTeXRendererProps } from '../components/renderers/KaTeXRenderer'
import type { LinkCardRendererProps } from '../components/renderers/LinkCardRenderer'
import type { MentionRendererProps } from '../components/renderers/MentionRenderer'
import type { MermaidRendererProps } from '../components/renderers/MermaidRenderer'
import type { VideoRendererProps } from '../components/renderers/VideoRenderer'

export interface GalleryImage {
  src: string
  alt?: string
  width?: number
  height?: number
  thumbhash?: string
}

export interface GalleryRendererProps {
  images: GalleryImage[]
  layout: 'grid' | 'masonry' | 'carousel'
  onImagesChange?: (images: GalleryImage[]) => void
  onLayoutChange?: (layout: 'grid' | 'masonry' | 'carousel') => void
}

export interface TabItem {
  label: string
  content: SerializedEditorState
}

export interface TabsRendererProps {
  tabs: TabItem[]
}

/**
 * Configuration for custom renderers.
 * Allows overriding default renderers with custom implementations.
 */
export interface RendererConfig {
  /** Custom renderer for alert/callout headers */
  Alert?: ComponentType<AlertRendererProps>
  /** Custom renderer for banner blocks */
  Banner?: ComponentType<BannerRendererProps>
  /** Custom renderer for code blocks with syntax highlighting */
  CodeBlock?: ComponentType<CodeBlockRendererProps>
  /** Custom renderer for footnote references */
  Footnote?: ComponentType<FootnoteRendererProps>
  /** Custom renderer for image galleries */
  Gallery?: ComponentType<GalleryRendererProps>
  /** Custom renderer for images with captions */
  Image?: ComponentType<ImageRendererProps>
  /** Custom renderer for KaTeX mathematical expressions (inline and block) */
  KaTeX?: ComponentType<KaTeXRendererProps>
  /** Custom renderer for link preview cards */
  LinkCard?: ComponentType<LinkCardRendererProps>
  /** Custom renderer for Mermaid diagrams */
  Mermaid?: ComponentType<MermaidRendererProps>
  /** Custom renderer for social media mentions */
  Mention?: ComponentType<MentionRendererProps>
  /** Custom renderer for tabbed content */
  Tabs?: ComponentType<TabsRendererProps>
  /** Custom renderer for video embeds */
  Video?: ComponentType<VideoRendererProps>
}

import type {
  GalleryImage,
  GalleryRendererProps,
  SlashMenuItemConfig,
} from '@shiro/rich-editor'
import { createRendererDecoration } from '@shiro/rich-editor'
import type {
  EditorConfig,
  LexicalEditor,
  LexicalNode,
  NodeKey,
  SerializedLexicalNode,
  Spread,
} from 'lexical'
import { $getNodeByKey, $insertNodes, DecoratorNode } from 'lexical'
import { Images } from 'lucide-react'
import type { ReactElement } from 'react'
import { createElement } from 'react'

import { GalleryRenderer } from './GalleryRenderer'

export type SerializedGalleryNode = Spread<
  {
    images: GalleryImage[]
    layout?: 'grid' | 'masonry' | 'carousel'
  },
  SerializedLexicalNode
>

export interface GalleryNodePayload {
  images: GalleryImage[]
  layout?: 'grid' | 'masonry' | 'carousel'
}

export class GalleryNode extends DecoratorNode<ReactElement> {
  __images: GalleryImage[]
  __layout: 'grid' | 'masonry' | 'carousel'

  static slashMenuItems: SlashMenuItemConfig[] = [
    {
      title: 'Gallery',
      icon: createElement(Images, { size: 20 }),
      description: 'Image gallery grid',
      keywords: ['gallery', 'images', 'grid'],
      section: 'MEDIA',
      onSelect: (editor) => {
        editor.update(() => {
          $insertNodes([$createGalleryNode({ images: [] })])
        })
      },
    },
  ]

  static getType(): string {
    return 'gallery'
  }

  static clone(node: GalleryNode): GalleryNode {
    return new GalleryNode(
      {
        images: node.__images.map((img) => ({ ...img })),
        layout: node.__layout,
      },
      node.__key,
    )
  }

  constructor(payload: GalleryNodePayload, key?: NodeKey) {
    super(key)
    this.__images = payload.images
    this.__layout = payload.layout || 'grid'
  }

  createDOM(_config: EditorConfig): HTMLElement {
    const div = document.createElement('div')
    div.className = `rich-gallery rich-gallery-${this.__layout}`
    return div
  }

  updateDOM(): boolean {
    return false
  }

  isInline(): boolean {
    return false
  }

  static importJSON(serializedNode: SerializedGalleryNode): GalleryNode {
    return $createGalleryNode({
      images: serializedNode.images,
      layout: serializedNode.layout,
    })
  }

  exportJSON(): SerializedGalleryNode {
    return {
      ...super.exportJSON(),
      type: 'gallery',
      images: this.__images,
      layout: this.__layout,
      version: 1,
    }
  }

  getImages(): GalleryImage[] {
    return this.getLatest().__images
  }

  setImages(images: GalleryImage[]): void {
    const writable = this.getWritable()
    writable.__images = images
  }

  getLayout(): 'grid' | 'masonry' | 'carousel' {
    return this.getLatest().__layout
  }

  setLayout(layout: 'grid' | 'masonry' | 'carousel'): void {
    const writable = this.getWritable()
    writable.__layout = layout
  }

  decorate(editor: LexicalEditor, _config: EditorConfig): ReactElement {
    const nodeKey = this.__key
    const isEditable = editor.isEditable()
    const props: GalleryRendererProps = {
      images: this.__images,
      layout: this.__layout,
      ...(isEditable && {
        onImagesChange: (images: GalleryImage[]) => {
          editor.update(() => {
            const node = $getNodeByKey(nodeKey) as GalleryNode | null
            if (node) node.setImages(images)
          })
        },
        onLayoutChange: (layout: 'grid' | 'masonry' | 'carousel') => {
          editor.update(() => {
            const node = $getNodeByKey(nodeKey) as GalleryNode | null
            if (node) node.setLayout(layout)
          })
        },
      }),
    }
    return createRendererDecoration('Gallery', GalleryRenderer, props)
  }
}

export function $createGalleryNode(payload: GalleryNodePayload): GalleryNode {
  return new GalleryNode(payload)
}

export function $isGalleryNode(
  node: LexicalNode | null | undefined,
): node is GalleryNode {
  return node instanceof GalleryNode
}
```
</details></tool-use>

# Gallery Edit Renderer Plan

## Context

`@shiro/rich-ext-gallery` currently only has a static `GalleryRenderer` (grid/masonry/carousel + lightbox). Editor mode lacks editing capabilities - users cannot add/remove/reorder images or change layout. Need a `GalleryEditRenderer` with a fullscreen Dialog editor, following the Mermaid/Tldraw edit renderer pattern.

## Approach: Mermaid-style Callback Props + Dialog Editor

Use the callback-in-props pattern (like MermaidNode) rather than DOM-lookup (like VideoNode). Cleaner, type-safe, no private field mutation.

## Changes

### 1. Extend `GalleryRendererProps` type

**File**: `packages/rich-editor/src/types/renderer-config.ts`

Add optional callbacks:

```typescript
export interface GalleryRendererProps {
  images: GalleryImage[]
  layout: 'grid' | 'masonry' | 'carousel'
  onImagesChange?: (images: GalleryImage[]) => void
  onLayoutChange?: (layout: 'grid' | 'masonry' | 'carousel') => void
}
```

### 2. Update `GalleryNode.decorate()` to pass callbacks

**File**: `packages/rich-ext-gallery/src/GalleryNode.ts`

When `editor.isEditable()`, pass `onImagesChange` and `onLayoutChange` closures that call `editor.update()` + `$getNodeByKey()` + `node.setImages()`/`node.setLayout()`.

```typescript
decorate(editor: LexicalEditor, _config: EditorConfig): ReactElement {
  const nodeKey = this.__key
  const isEditable = editor.isEditable()
  const props: GalleryRendererProps = {
    images: this.__images,
    layout: this.__layout,
    ...(isEditable && {
      onImagesChange: (images: GalleryImage[]) => {
        editor.update(() => {
          const node = $getNodeByKey(nodeKey) as GalleryNode | null
          if (node) node.setImages(images)
        })
      },
      onLayoutChange: (layout: 'grid' | 'masonry' | 'carousel') => {
        editor.update(() => {
          const node = $getNodeByKey(nodeKey) as GalleryNode | null
          if (node) node.setLayout(layout)
        })
      },
    }),
  }
  return createRendererDecoration('Gallery', GalleryRenderer, props)
}
```

### 3. Create `GalleryEditRenderer.tsx`

**File**: `packages/rich-ext-gallery/src/GalleryEditRenderer.tsx`

Main component structure:

```
GalleryEditRenderer (props: GalleryRendererProps)
├── if no onImagesChange → delegate to GalleryRenderer (static mode)
├── Static gallery preview + "Edit Gallery" overlay button
└── onClick → presentDialog(GalleryEditorDialogContent)

GalleryEditorDialogContent
├── Header: title + layout selector (grid/masonry/carousel toggle) + close
├── Body: image list editor
│   ├── Draggable image cards (thumbnail + URL/alt fields + delete button)
│   └── "Add Image" button (at bottom)
├── Footer: Cancel + Save buttons
```

Key behaviors:
- `presentDialog` from `@shiro/rich-editor-ui` for fullscreen dialog
- `usePortalTheme` for theme-consistent portal
- Layout switcher: 3 toggle buttons (Grid/Masonry/Carousel)
- Image list: each item shows thumbnail preview, editable URL input, alt input, delete button
- Add image: appends blank `{ src: '', alt: '' }` entry, auto-focuses URL input
- Reorder: drag handle or up/down buttons
- Save: calls `onImagesChange(editedImages)` + `onLayoutChange(editedLayout)` + dismiss
- Cancel: dismiss without saving
- Empty state: centered "Add your first image" prompt

Dependencies: `@shiro/rich-editor-ui` (`presentDialog`, `usePortalTheme`), `lucide-react` (icons), existing `GalleryRenderer` for preview.

### 4. Add edit styles to `styles.css.ts`

**File**: `packages/rich-ext-gallery/src/styles.css.ts`

Add styles for:
- Edit overlay button (positioned over gallery preview)
- Dialog layout (header, body, footer)
- Image list items (card style with thumbnail + inputs)
- Layout toggle buttons
- Add image button
- Empty state

Follow the pattern from `packages/rich-ext-tldraw/src/styles.css.ts` (dialog header/footer/canvas structure) and `packages/rich-renderer-mermaid/src/styles.css.ts` (editor popup, buttons).

### 5. Export from package index

**File**: `packages/rich-ext-gallery/src/index.ts`

Add:
```typescript
export { GalleryEditRenderer } from './GalleryEditRenderer'
```

### 6. Register in edit renderer config

**File**: `packages/rich-renderers-edit/src/config.ts`

Add:
```typescript
import { GalleryEditRenderer } from '@shiro/rich-ext-gallery'

export const enhancedEditRendererConfig: RendererConfig = {
  ...enhancedRendererConfig,
  // ... existing entries
  Gallery: GalleryEditRenderer,
}
```

### 7. Update `packages/rich-ext-gallery/package.json`

Add `@shiro/rich-editor-ui` and `lucide-react` to `peerDependencies` (or `dependencies` if the package pattern requires it — check existing `rich-ext-tldraw/package.json` for reference).

## File Summary

| File | Action |
|------|--------|
| `packages/rich-editor/src/types/renderer-config.ts` | Add `onImagesChange?`, `onLayoutChange?`
... (truncated)

_**Agent (gpt-5.1-codex-mini 2026-02-19 10:06:01Z)**_

- **High:** `packages/rich-ext-tldraw/src/TldrawEditRenderer.tsx#L117-L122` – `handleSaveAndClose` fires `performSave()` and then immediately reads the snapshot, calls `onClose`, and dismisses the dialog. When the storage mode is remote, `performSave` returns before the `saveSnapshot` promise resolves (and it never rejects up the stack), so a network failure or server error leaves `onSnapshotChange` uncalled even though the dialog already closed. That silently drops whatever the user just drew. Await the remote save (surface errors/keep the dialog open while saving) before dismissing to avoid data loss.
